title: Google SEO Starter Guide

title: Schema.org Documentation
description: Official Schema.org vocabulary documentation for structured data markup.

title: Google Rich Results Test
description: Google tool to test and validate structured data for rich search results.

description: Free Google tool to monitor and maintain site presence in search results.

description: W3C HTML validator that checks for issues affecting SEO and accessibility.

description: Google tool to measure Core Web Vitals and page performance suggestions.

description: Google tool to test if pages are mobile-friendly for mobile-first indexing.

description: Comprehensive beginner's guide to SEO covering all fundamental concepts.

title: Google Core Web Vitals
description: Official documentation for Core Web Vitals metrics and optimization.

title: Screaming Frog SEO Spider
description: SEO audit tool that crawls websites to analyze titles, meta, headings, and links.
